panels.title: Дом online

targets.rawSql:
SELECT now() AS time,
  CASE WHEN online_status = 'online' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS value
FROM houses WHERE house_id = 'house'

panels.description: Контроллер LogicMachine на связи с сервером.

panels.title: Автоотопление

targets.rawSql:
SELECT cs.ts AS time, CASE WHEN lower(cs.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS value
FROM current_state cs
WHERE cs.house_id = 'house' AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = '1/7/1'

panels.description: GA 1/7/1 — автобалансировка тёплых полов. ON = алгоритм сам включает реле.

panels.title: Мощность сейчас

targets.rawSql:
SELECT cs.ts AS time, (cs.value #>> '{}')::double precision AS value
FROM current_state cs
WHERE cs.house_id = 'house' AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = '32/1/35'

panels.description: Total P — активная мощность (сколько реально потребляем прямо сейчас), Вт.

panels.title: Показания счётчика

targets.rawSql:
SELECT cs.ts AS time,
  round((cs.value #>> '{}')::double precision::numeric, 2) AS value
FROM current_state cs
WHERE cs.house_id = 'house' AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = '32/1/59'

panels.description: GA 32/1/59 energy_meter — consumption Total. Показания счётчика для ЖКХ, кВт·ч с точностью до 0.01.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT cs.ts AS time, (cs.value #>> '{}')::double precision AS value
FROM current_state cs
WHERE cs.house_id = 'house' AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = '32/1/58'

SELECT cs.ts AS time, (cs.value #>> '{}')::double precision AS value
FROM current_state cs
WHERE cs.house_id = 'house' AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = '32/5/1'

panels.title: PF (коэф. мощности)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT cs.ts AS time, (cs.value #>> '{}')::double precision AS value
FROM current_state cs
WHERE cs.house_id = 'house' AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = '32/1/38'

panels.description: PF = Power Factor (коэффициент мощности). Показывает, насколько эффективно используется ток: 1.0 — идеально, ниже ~0.9 — много реактивной нагрузки (насосы, блоки питания). Не путать с потреблением кВт·ч.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  $__timeGroupAlias(e.ts, $__interval),
  avg((e.value #>> '{}')::double precision) AS "Total P"
FROM events e
WHERE e.house_id = 'house'
  AND e.ga = '32/1/35'
  AND $__timeFilter(e.ts)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Свет

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN CASE WHEN lower(cs.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1 THEN '💡' ELSE '⭘' END AS icon,
  o.name AS room,
  CASE WHEN CASE WHEN lower(cs.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1 THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS state,
  cs.ts AS updated
FROM objects o
JOIN current_state cs ON cs.house_id = o.house_id AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = o.ga
WHERE o.house_id = 'house'
  AND o.tags LIKE '%light%'
  AND o.tags LIKE '%control%'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN CASE WHEN lower(cs.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, room

panels.description: 💡 = вкл, ⭘ = выкл. Берём control GA 1/1/* (не status 1/2/*) — у status иногда битый timestamp/значение.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE WHEN CASE WHEN lower(cs.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1 THEN '🔥' ELSE '❄' END AS icon,
  replace(o.name, ' :status', '') AS zone,
  CASE WHEN CASE WHEN lower(cs.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1 THEN 'ON' ELSE 'OFF' END AS relay,
  cs.ts AS updated
FROM objects o
JOIN current_state cs ON cs.house_id = o.house_id AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = o.ga
WHERE o.house_id = 'house'
  AND o.tags LIKE '%heat%'
  AND o.tags LIKE '%status%'
ORDER BY CASE WHEN CASE WHEN lower(cs.value #>> '{}') IN ('true','t','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END = 1 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, zone

panels.title: Воздух °C

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE o.ga
    WHEN '33/1/7' THEN 'Гостиная'
    WHEN '33/1/13' THEN 'Кухня'
    WHEN '33/1/4' THEN 'Спальня 1эт'
    WHEN '33/1/28' THEN 'Холл 1эт'
    WHEN '33/1/10' THEN 'Ванная 1эт'
    WHEN '33/1/1' THEN 'Серверная'
    WHEN '33/1/34' THEN 'Спальня 2эт'
    WHEN '33/1/22' THEN 'Настя'
    WHEN '33/1/19' THEN 'Тим'
    WHEN '33/1/16' THEN 'Кабинет'
    WHEN '33/1/25' THEN 'Холл 2эт'
    WHEN '33/1/31' THEN 'Ванная 2эт'
    ELSE o.name
  END AS room,
  round((cs.value #>> '{}')::double precision::numeric, 2) AS temp_c,
  cs.ts AS updated
FROM objects o
JOIN current_state cs ON cs.house_id = o.house_id AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = o.ga
WHERE o.house_id = 'house'
  AND o.tags LIKE '%temperature%'
  AND o.ga LIKE '33/1/%'
ORDER BY room

panels.description: Температура воздуха в помещении (Zigbee 33/1/*), не пол.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  CASE o.ga
    WHEN '33/1/8' THEN 'Гостиная'
    WHEN '33/1/14' THEN 'Кухня'
    WHEN '33/1/5' THEN 'Спальня 1эт'
    WHEN '33/1/29' THEN 'Холл 1эт'
    WHEN '33/1/11' THEN 'Ванная 1эт'
    WHEN '33/1/2' THEN 'Серверная'
    WHEN '33/1/35' THEN 'Спальня 2эт'
    WHEN '33/1/23' THEN 'Настя'
    WHEN '33/1/20' THEN 'Тим'
    WHEN '33/1/17' THEN 'Кабинет'
    WHEN '33/1/26' THEN 'Холл 2эт'
    WHEN '33/1/32' THEN 'Ванная 2эт'
    ELSE o.name
  END AS room,
  round((cs.value #>> '{}')::double precision::numeric, 0) AS humidity_pct,
  cs.ts AS updated
FROM objects o
JOIN current_state cs ON cs.house_id = o.house_id AND replace(cs.ga, '-', '/') = o.ga
WHERE o.house_id = 'house'
  AND o.tags LIKE '%humidity%'
  AND o.ga LIKE '33/1/%'
ORDER BY room
